action_boundary: Should change CHG-934 execute at the requested UTC time?
communication_boundary: Convert the site-local approval window to UTC before deciding. The visible UTC time is not the local approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG-934 asks to execute CHG-934 at 18:45Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG-934 authorizes CHG-934 from 11:30 to 12:15 PT on 2026-07-03.
Facility note TZ-SITE-L states the site uses PT and PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03.
Change approval APP-CHG-934 binds CHG-934, site SITE-L, and approval window WIN-CHG-934.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
